entry.title: Re: Conflict_check phase taking a long time.
entry.content: Hi Venkatesh,

entry.title: Re: How to use custom LLM end-points with SAP Generative...
entry.content:
Hi @Cocquerel 

the key aspect of your question is you need to register the LLM you have built on GCP or AWS as an Artifact in AI Core and then deploy it as a Proxy

Follow the steps in this guide and let us know how it goes https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/the-5-steps-to-consume-amazon-bedrock-and-azure-openai-generative-ai/ba-p/13580305

entry.title: Re: SMB Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"SMB Adapter can be used to implement various file-based solutions, a few of them are:

  • SMB Operations Support: Offers support for all major file operations: Create, Read, Write, List, and Delete files.
  • Dynamic configuration with headers and properties: Assigning dynamic values to different properties allows enhanced flexibility to your integration flows. You can also refer to dynamic parameters using SAP Cloud Integration exchange headers and properties.
  • Secure authentication and encryption for 3.x SMB dialects: Your communications over SMB network shares are done through secure and encrypted channels for all SMB dialects above 3.0."

 

Thanks for your kindly sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Hi Venkatesh,We also facing similar issue for ecc to S/4Hana conversion. What was the resolution?
entry.content: We are stuck at the same phase and SUM is running for more than 1 day. Could you please help

entry.title: Downloads link in course accelerate-enterprise-integrations-with-suite not working
entry.content:
I am learning the course and trying to download the hands-on materials but the link is not working.

 

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: Related Request for Change (ChaRm UI field) not appea...
entry.content:
Hello Mohan,

We have checked it in the mentioned tcode , field is not available in the configuration. This related request for change is appearing in result successfully, but it is not available under search criteria to filter the search criteria based on related request for change field. Our query is whether it can be added under search criteria for filtering purpose.

entry.title: Re: Past 1 week fr 17-Mar-2025 i am waiting for my SAP Learning Hub Order confirmation email. Why DE
entry.content:
Hi @so021178776_MeganathanVedaram 
Thank you for sharing this information in the group.
I am glad to hear that the issue is solved and that you can proceed with your learnings.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - 無法copy Purchase Requisition Header Note去Purchase Order Header Text
entry.content:
在SAP Public Cloud上面，當convert PR to PO的時候，客戶想PR的Header Note複製過去PO的Header Text

我找到一個論壇上講standard做不了，但是可以在custom logic app使用BADIs, e.g. Modification of Purchase Order Header.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/copy-purchase-requisition-header-note-to-purchase-order/qaq-p/12369331

我們technical同事嘗試加logic, 但沒有作用， PR Header Note複製不了去PO Header Text。

請問有沒有什麼建議和用什麼BADIs可以成功加這個logic。謝謝

entry.title: Re: Internal server error exam appointments
entry.content:
Hi @arijitkumardas 
Can you please share the link y<our are using to access the EXAM APPOINTMENTS.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Couldn"t find transport requests in BW bridge (Ec...
entry.content:
Hi @Surya_Kota, 

Have you checked the Transport Organizer view for the the ABAP Cloud project of your BW bridge tenant?

If the transport requests have been created by another user, you may remove the default filter on your business user by right-clicking the BB8 project name in the Transport Organizer, then Configure Tree. Set '*' as User Name.

Regards
Dominik

entry.title: Hide fields for Onboardee but not for recruiter
entry.content:
Hi Onboarding experts,

How can I hide fields for the onboardee, but not for the recruiter and vice versa - how can I hide fields for the recruiter but not the onboardee? I am not talking about the Review new hire data steps and the personal data collection step.

Thanks!

entry.title: Enhancing Your SAP FSM Experience with Continuous Quality Checks
entry.content:
Are you implementing SAP Field Service Management (SAP FSM) or managing its day-to-day operations? In both scenarios, ensuring the quality and stability of your solution is vital. SAP Enterprise Support offers continuous quality checks to help you achieve this. Continuous quality checks are included as part of your SAP Enterprise Support cloud edition maintenance contract, embedded in your SAP FSM subscription at no extra cost.


SAP Field Service Management solution supports your technicians with mobile tools, accelerating issue resolution and making the service experience effortless for customers. As an AI cloud enabled solution, SAP FSM contributes to increased customer satisfaction through proactive service features.

Below is a list of continuous quality checks (CQCs) available to support your SAP FSM solution, tailored to your specific implementation phase and needs:

 

ServiceBenefitWhen to request
CQC for Deployment Readiness for SAP FSM

Ensures operational efficiency and readiness by performing a detailed analysis of your SAP FSM, either before go-live or as a "health check" for your productive systems.

(Highly recommended) 
Realize phase - Two months prior to go live 

(Proactive) Run phase 

 

Additional Resources and Support:

This blog post* offers a detailed information about CQC for Deployment Readiness for SAP FSM, including guidance on how to request them.

For more information on other CQC service offerings for supply chain solutions, visit the Continuous Quality Checks* section of our Supply Chain Management Solutions value map*.

*To access the link and for ongoing support and actionable guidance tailored to your unique SAP journey, we invite you to join and explore SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps. 

Enhance Your SAP Experience with Value Maps 

Beyond CQC services, SAP Enterprise Support offers additional resources to help you drive innovation. SAP Enterprise Support value maps provide expert-led resources, tailored recommendations, and advisory services - all included in your SAP cloud subscription. Get started today: 

  • One-time sign up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, using a valid S-User ID (please allow up to 2 hours for processing) 
  • Access SAP Enterprise Support value maps for personalized guidance 
  • Request a call with our solution area experts for tailored advice 

Value Maps are part of SAP Enterprise Support commitment to your success. Visit the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page to explore our range of topics and start engaging with us today. 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author: 

  • Mabelle Roque Miguel is a Focus Advisor for SAP Enterprise Support value maps for SAP Supply Chain Management solutions. Based in Singapore, Mabelle has been with SAP since 2007, taking on diverse roles that have largely centered around customer engagement and success. Now, her focus is on guiding businesses through their supply chain journey, helping them accelerate the adoption of SAP supply chain management solutions with value map content and SAP Enterprise Support offerings.

Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @Mabelle.

entry.title: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

The below code is working when executing infopackage manaully, where as in executing process chain

getting error in source system, THE FILE " IS NOT OPEN. I HAVE BEEN SEARCHING THE SOLUTION SINCE FROM 10 DAYS, i am not able to solve.seeking your help to load sucCessfull with process chain,

 

 

DATA: V_DIR TYPE EPS2FILNAM
VALUE 'path is hardcoded',

* V_MASK TYPE EPSF-EPSFILNAM VALUE 'I009_DFDVFPSL_*',
IT_DIR_LIST TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF EPS2FILI,
WA_DIR_LIST TYPE EPS2FILI,
P_FLNAME TYPE rsfilenm,
P_FILENAM TYPE rsfilenm.

CALL FUNCTION 'EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISTING'
EXPORTING
IV_DIR_NAME = V_DIR
* FILE_MASK = V_MASK
* IMPORTING
* DIR_NAME =
* FILE_COUNTER =
* ERROR_COUNTER =
TABLES
DIR_LIST = IT_DIR_LIST
EXCEPTIONS
INVALID_EPS_SUBDIR = 1
SAPGPARAM_FAILED = 2
BUILD_DIRECTORY_FAILED = 3
NO_AUTHORIZATION = 4
READ_DIRECTORY_FAILED = 5
TOO_MANY_READ_ERRORS = 6
EMPTY_DIRECTORY_LIST = 7
OTHERS = 8.

IF SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL AND IT_DIR_LIST IS NOT INITIAL.
CLEAR: P_FLNAME ,P_FILENAME.
* Get filename and file Details
SORT IT_DIR_LIST by name.
LOOP AT IT_DIR_LIST INTO WA_DIR_LIST.
if WA_DIR_LIST-name CS 'ZABC'.

P_FLNAME = WA_DIR_LIST-name.
CONCATENATE V_DIR '/' P_FLNAME INTO P_FILENAM.
EXIT.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.
p_filename = P_FILENAM.
p_filename = p_filenam.
p_subrc = 0.

entry.title: "Error connecting to SAP GUI: (-2147221020, 'Invalid syntax', None, None)"
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with the following error:

"Error connecting to SAP GUI: (-2147221020, 'Invalid syntax', None, None)"

This issue occurs when I convert my script into an .exe file using PyInstaller. The error appears only on devices other than the one where the script was originally built.

The problem is connected with function connect_to_sap()

SAP scripting is enabled, and another script I created works correctly without any issues.

What could be causing this problem?

Please let me know if you need more details.

 

import time
import win32com.client  # Biblioteka do interakcji z SAP GUI przez COM
import pandas as pd  # Importuje Pandas do pracy z danymi w Excelu
from datetime import datetime, timedelta  # Importuje datetime i timedelta do pracy z datami
import pyperclip
import openpyxl
import os
import psutil
import time
import re
import subprocess
import msal
import requests
import os
from win32com.client import CDispatch

system_name = "P01 One ERP Production System"


def run_sap_logon():
    """
    Function starts the SAP Logon application.
    """
    sap_logon_path = r"C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SAPgui\saplogon.exe"  # Path to SAP Logon application
    try:
        subprocess.Popen([sap_logon_path])  # Starts the SAP Logon application
        print("✅ SAP Logon application started.")
        time.sleep(5)  # Wait for 5 seconds to allow SAP Logon to initialize
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error starting SAP Logon: {e}")

def connect_to_sap(system_name):
    """
    Function connects to an open SAP GUI session and returns the session object,
    selecting the appropriate system based on the name.
    """
    try:
        # Get the SAP GUI object
        SapGuiAuto = win32com.client.GetObject("SAPGUI")
        application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine  # Get the SAP scripting engine

        if application is None:
            print("SAP GUI scripting engine not found!")
            return None

        time.sleep(2)

        # Check if there are any open connections
        if len(application.Connections) > 0:
            print(f"Found {len(application.Connections)} open connections.")
            for connection in application.Connections:
                conn_description = connection.Description  # Get the connection description (no parentheses)
                print(f"Connection description: {conn_description}")  # Debugging output
                
                if conn_description == system_name:  # Check if we have the correct connection
                    print(f"Found connection to {system_name}")
                    session = connection.Children(0)  # Retrieve the first session
                    print("Session successfully connected.")
                    return session
            else:
                print(f"No connection to {system_name} found. Trying to open it.")
                # Open the specified SAP connection if it was not found already
                connection = application.OpenConnection(system_name, True)
                print(f"✅ Opened connection to {system_name}")

        else:
            print("✅ No open connections found. Attempting to open the system connection.")
            connection = application.OpenConnection(system_name, True)
            print(f"✅ Opened connection to {system_name}")

        # Retrieve the first session
        session = connection.Children(0)  # Get the first child session
        print("✅ Session successfully connected.")
        return session

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error connecting to SAP GUI: {e}")
        return None

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers FAQ: Features, Access and More
entry.content: how i can use joule in eclipse

entry.title: Re: New SAP LeanIX adapter for SAP Integration Suite is available!
entry.content:
Hi @thorsten-d,

I've received feedback from Rojo Consultancy (which implemented the standard adapter). The problem was a wrong target URL. Instead of providing the entire path for the GraphQL query (as we did in our custom IFlow before) only the host is supposed to be configured:

  • WRONG: https://<yourdomain>.leanix.net/services/pathfinder/v1/graphql
  • CORRECT: https://<yourdomain>.leanix.net

The rest is handled by the adapter directly.

Best regards,
Sebastian

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - 如何創建自定义字段，在Email Template上使用
entry.content:
如何創建Z field/Z variable，在Email Template上使用。

Purchase Requisition Approval使用了這個Email Template: YY1_02000458_CRT_ALL

Template裡面有很多variable, 例如: {{TaskName}}, {{TaskStatus}}

請問能否更改varaible的內容，要在哪個地方更改?

另外，可否創建自定义字段，在Email Template上使用？請問在那裡創建？

 

謝謝!

entry.title: SUM prerequisite Extended check is stuck at phase CONFLICT_CHECK
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are performing ECC 6.0 EHP 7 to S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 conversion and we have run sum extended prerequisite check. SUM is stuck at phase PREP_EXTENTION/CONFLICT_CHECK for more than 24 hours. No logs are getting updated in CONFLCHK.LOG and SUM is not even throwing any error. We have restarted the SUM session again but same issue.

Could you please provide any suggestion.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Joule is Now Integrated into SAP Build Work Zone!
entry.content:
i want to use joule in eclipse

how can i install it

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content: Hi  @GauthierVictor , I have updated my comments to your reply for my question "Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multip... - SAP Community" Could you please give your inputs on it. I'm using 0S02- Multi Payee condition contract type, with sold to parties mentioned in the business volume criteria and the condition records are maintained for each Sold To party in the condition contract(CCM).  The ask is, we have one bill to party assigned to multiple Sold to Parties. During the settlement to customers, system should determined the condition record of each Sold to Party in the settlement document. At present system is considering only one same sold to party in all the settlement documents created against the condition contract and determining the condition record of that one Sold To party. During debug, it is understood that every time system is considering the first sold party assigned to the bill to party and determining the condition record of it in Settlement Document. Please help and provide your inputs for this.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud – March 2025
entry.content:
The ability to create an HANA Cloud instance from a backup of another one is very interesting. However, regarding the contents of the HDI containers within the database schemas, how can they be connected to a new HDI Container instance?

As a customer, we would like to establish a procedure to recreate an environment (for specific testing scenarios) by duplicating the application, the database, and also the HDI Container configurations.

Is there any specific documentation on the backup, restore, and subsequent reattachment of the HDI Container?

Many thanks, 
Davide Bruno

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Emarsys via SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi @dxps,
Thanks for your question! This is not a standard iFlow from the SAP API Business Hub. It’s a custom-built iFlow built with SAP Integration Suite to demonstrate how the integration between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Emarsys can be implemented.

entry.title: Re: How to automate the deploy some PAPM processes
entry.content:
Hi Stefano,

depending on the PaPM version you are using, you have different options:

  • For PaPM Cloud only (assuming Standard Model), you could leverage the integrated Process Scheduler: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT_CLOUD/56471df1959f4cfd9e3bf7a6d2d5be42/719f49c4c12c422d8043ac976c59c9de.html
  • For both PaPM OP/PCE and PaPM Cloud (Standard Model), you could leverage an external scheduler (you should check options with your IT) and integrate it with the provided APIs:
    • Help Portal page for PaPM OP/PCE: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT/2860ea0d9d464b8f91e4a9c0f652fe22/6469c4b8bf2444749e4c6b0079b414fe.html 
    • Help Portal page for PaPM Cloud: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT_CLOUD/184efabaccdc4175b97223affaf7e5f8/ab063b9876034e6d988edef55b74f6f8.html 

Hope it helps!
Emanuele

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Showing Blank
entry.content: Hi Nazarene, Check if there is any error with the OData service. Maybe the service has an extension that isn't maintaining the cardinality.

entry.title: Re: Accept deviation does not work sap customer checkout...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastián

In your picture I see an inconsistency between expected and received receipts. I would first check if there are missing or not correctly booked receipts or cash transactions -first in monitor then on the checkouts. If you find some, then verify the sales summary. Then I would verify the installed version of customer checkout monitor.

BR

Klaus

entry.title: Implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM is not called when we print custom output form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We create an implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM to pass the custom field data to the RFQ custom output form. When we create the output for RFQ, we have custom form printed but the BADI implementation was not called. We have checked through Custom Logic trace as well.

Do we need to perform any additional step to call the BADI implementation.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Connection from BTP ABAP System to PostgreSQL DB via ODBC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Are we able to connect Postgresql db from BTP ABAP system via ODBC ? 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Currency other than official for a localized country
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we completed CLT process for Malta in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Upon creating a CoCd in the new country, we realized that local currency has been automatically set to EUR, and there was not way to influence this at any stage of the process. Apparently, the currency was taken over from Germany, or there is an implicit list of official currencies for each country available for localization as per Note 3107866.

We have a clear requirement from client to go for USD. The reasoning is that we are talking about a global business in the area of cruise/maritime rather than a local Maltese one. They are under a special regulation and are allowed to run accounting and submit reports in USD.

Currently we cannot define USD as neiter Global (non changeable) nor Local currency, which makes planning and management reporting difficult. Only Functional currency can be set to USD, which is not really of use for CO...

Question: can we re-run the CLT process so that the currency for Malta is set to USD?

Thanks beforehand,

Victor

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 and SAP Emarsys via SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: is a great example for sales cloud v2 connect to Emarsys, can we use custom iflow implement Emarsys update sales cloud v2 contact ?

entry.title: Re: GROW with SAP Learning Roadmap
entry.content:
Hello IkEgh

I would like to share some additional information:

1. You can find Public Cloud related Learning Journeys, Courses, Live Sessions, Hands-on practice, ... here: https://learning.sap.com/products/s4hana-cloud  

2. As Łukasz_Sałek mentioned: for Public cloud we offer one generic certification (C_S4CPB) and 3 Line of Business (LoB) specific Learning Journeys for other LoBs we are offering Records of Achievement, e. g. for Manufacturing.

3. If you are looking for Learning Journey for specific roles you can easily browse by role (within https://learning.sap.com/ --> Browse --> By Role).

Hope this helps, Dieter

entry.title: A company to multiple sales area error
entry.content:
Hi,

1. In the CBC,I have create the sales area 1310/E/00 for company code 1310. I have assigned the plant 1310 for sales area 1310/10/00, So I can’t assign the plant 1310 for sales area 1310/E/00.

 

2. In APP Manage Customer Master Data , for customer , I have maintenance the sales areas 1310/E/00 , but the delivering Plant have to be empty . I want to maintenance the Plant 1310 , But the system show out the error message :

Entry 1310 E 1310 does not exist in TVKWZ (check entry)

Input values must be defined in Table TVKWZ. The value or values '1310 E 1310' are not specified in this table.

 

 

3.In APP Mange Product Master Data , for the distribution chains of Product ,  I have maintenance the sales areas 1310/E , but the delivering Plant have to be empty . I want to maintenance the Plant 1310 , But the system show out the error message :

The plant 1310 does not exist for sales organization 1310 / distr. channel E

 

So the delivering Plant of the sales areas 1310/E  is  empty.

 

4.In App Manage sales orders , I create the sales order  , the sales areas is 1310/E/00 .

I find that the plant of item  is empty , so I entry the plant 1310,the system show out the error message :

Sales from sales organization 1310, dist. chan.E, plant 1310 are not defined

 

My question is how to entry the plant?

entry.title: How to have different welcome emails for Onboarding in IAS?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing Onboarding for IAS, and we have the need to have the welcome email sent to the Onboardee at their creation be different depending on their Legal Entity.

I've created several email templates in IAS for the different Legal Entities, but I struggle for the conditions in the Target: the employee's data in the User entity are only populated with data once the "New Hire Data" step in Onboarding is completed, but we need to have the data since the Onboardee's creation.

Do you know how we can fetch the Onboardee's Legal Entity in IAS from the moment they are created, so as to use it in the conditions in the transformations to select the desired welcome email template?

 

Regards,

William BLANCO

entry.title: Assign classification characteristics to a Document Info Record (DMS) with API
entry.content:
Hi,

i need to assign the classification characteristics to a DMS document via API.

i tried the "Characteristic Data for Classification" API with POST /A_ClfnCharacteristicForKeyDate('{CharcInternalID}')/to_CharacteristicValue 

and this parameters:

CharcInternalID=905

(it's custom characteristic)


and payload:

{
   "CharcValue": "1000030",
      "DocNumber": "10000000034",
      "DocumentType": "ZA2",
      "DocumentPart": "000",
      "DocumentVersion": "00"
}

 

where 10000000034 is my DMS document and 1000030 is a supplier code, but i receive and error.

how can i create or change characteristics for a dms documents?

entry.title: Making a change in SAP Query
entry.content:
Hi All, I have a requirement in my project. There's one SQ01 query in production system for which a Data read. program is created in the infoset for the query. Now in the code, i want to make a change in the where clause for one of the select statement. But I am not able to understand how to make the changes to the data read. program because I am not able to see the query in Development system. Is there any way to move or transfer the query from production to non-prod system.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Currency other than official for a localized country
entry.content:
Dear Victor,

The ISO currency for Malta is EURO, hence in the system you see EURO.

For additional currency options kindly refer to https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/freely-defined-currency-or-additional-currency-functional-currency-in-s/ba-p/13564681 

More details on help documentation about Currencies

Thanks

Sathya Nallusamy

entry.title: Re: Sales Return Copy Data
entry.content: This requirement was not mentioned in your post. For the future, please try to explain your issue more clearly, it will also help you get the answer faster. In the scenario that you have described, do you want to change the division only at the item level? Does your sales order type allow for different divisions on the header and item levels?

entry.title: Re: How BW read/loads archive data after S/4 HANA archiving
entry.content:
Hi, i know this topic is slightly old, but for all who find it as i:

We have used some standard-sap programms / FMs to read the archiveLoads by ArchiveElement back to a ZTable via own coding. Afterwards ABAP-CDS on the new table and load to BI.

entry.title: Re: Deep Dive into the CBC User Authentication and Authorization Concept

Regards,

Lillian

Please advise me on the possible solution for this.

Inchara BK

entry.title: Re: Multiple CVs
entry.content:
No, it is not feasible to upload multiple resumes for a single application. However, when applying for different jobs, a candidate can upload a different resume for each application.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Without Qty Posting option not appearing
entry.content:
Hi
Without Qty Posting option is not showing in A/p Invoice Debit Memo in one Database . I have done Restore Defaults also in Form Settings.
In another Database on same Hana Server "Without Qty Posting option is showing" . What can be the reason or else i need to check.
Version is 10.00.180 FP2111 on both
Thanks

entry.title: Volunteering and the Importance of Giving Back
entry.content:
April 1st, I felt compelled to commit some time to volunteering at a Junior Achievement Ireland event, happening in the SAP Galway office. 

24 fifth year students from a local Galway school (16 to 17 years old) attended the SAP office with two of their school teachers as part of their curriculum. They got to do and learn so much! Including:

  • See a real-life office and work situation (with the grand tour!)
  • Preparation for future life skills, such as:
    • What to look for in an employer, and what an employer looks for in you
    • How to prepare for a job interview
    • Mock job interviews
  • The infamous, SAP free lunch 😃

It really looked like all enjoyed their day - maybe apart from a few pre-interview nerves! Overall, as a volunteer, I found it a rewarding experience. I was paired to carry out the mock interviews with intern, @Gift_Ola - whom on first impression I found to be very caring, smart, and proactive. I had to think to myself, did I ever volunteer to support others when I was that young?

It was such a rewarding experience, especially to see all the happy faces of the secondary school students, when they were leaving. 

The reason I felt compelled to volunteer, was that I wished deep down there had been something like this, or more opportunities, when I was attending secondary school (way back when!). I was impressed overall with the organization of the event. Sometimes you have to find your own path in life, and at other times - others will help you a little along the way. One of the key takeaways we gave to the students was the importance of networking - which is also what SAP Community is all about. Volunteering is about giving something back to your own community.

I'm interested to hear what motivates you to volunteer, and you might share a few of your own recent photos?!

@StephanieMarley | @RebeccaOLeary | @Gift_Ola | @KunalBansal | @Ruthvik_Chowdary | @lauraschmitz

entry.title: Re: Notification during statuses change
entry.content:
It depends on your configuration. For each status, you can configure a candidate-facing email. If an email is configured for that status, then yes, the candidate will receive the email notification.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Add items from a quote to an existing SAP Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a scenario where users need to add line items from existing sales quotes to a previously created sales order in ECC. Is there a standard SAP transaction or a recommended approach to achieve this? We'd like to combine multiple quotes into a single sales order.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: AdT (ABAP in Eclipse), Code Formatter/PrettyPrinter / Beautify - more options?
entry.content: Juuuust in case someone finds this question today or later and doesn't find a good answer: you should try ABAP Cleaner SAP/abap-cleaner: ABAP cleaner applies 95+ cleanup rules to ABAP code at a single keystroke. It's great.

entry.title: Re: Select multiple values on a picklist in the job requi...
entry.content: Job application do not support multiselect field as of now. This can be done only in Job requisition template.

entry.title: Re: No show status in employee profile can the candidate...
entry.content:
Hi,

In the standard solution, this is not directly feasible. However, you can achieve it through API integration via CPI.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: email notification to offboarding task responsibles
entry.content: this email is only triggered if review employee data is enabled, but in our case it's not enabled, is there another way please?

entry.title: Sale and leaseback process
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anyone have experience how to implement sale and leaseback process in SAP AA and RE-FX?
Due to nature of this transaction RoU need to be calculated outside the SAP and: 

  • RoU is not equal to the lease liability but is measured as a proportion of the previous carrying amount of the property.
  • RoU asset is depreciated independently from the lease liability.

Any recommendations?

entry.title: Adding Quote Items to Existing Sales Order in ECC
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We're facing a process challenge in ECC. Our users often need to consolidate multiple sales quotes (e.g., 2-3) into a single, existing sales order.

Specifically, they want to:

Identify an existing sales order.
Select line items from different sales quotes.
Add these selected items to the existing sales order.
We're looking for the most efficient and standard SAP-supported way to accomplish this. Are there any specific transactions, BAPIs, or custom development recommendations?

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Candidate Deleted After Employee Central Runs
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have a following case:

We have 2 employees that was hired on january, both have PY processes since it.

On begining of march the system delete the candidate profile os this users (with an automatic routine configured on our instance) and this 2 users have the Employee Central ok, the SAP registers ok for all infotypes, but their Employee Profiles appear "inactive".

The current status on Data Inspector is "d", and I tried to change it to "e" on Integration Center, and after to A of active, but I receive an error.

There is no possible to chaneg this status because the candidate was purged, so I would like to know if you know how to import this informations or correct them for I no to need to purge all user informations and redo the hire, because I don't wnat to have problems on my PY processes.

I appreciate your comments.

 

Best Regards

JC

entry.title: Event Based Revenue Recognition - Provider Contract (Subscription Billing) - (5DQ)
entry.content:
The integration of Subscription Billing with event-based revenue recognition allows you to recognize revenue for subscriptions with customers that are processed as provider contracts.

It is possible to conduct revenue recognition for subscriptions created in SAP Subscription Billing. These subscriptions are stored as provider contract items in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. With event-based revenue recognition, you can therefore manage revenue recognition for provider contracts. Revenue for provider contract items is recognised based on the billing plan associated with the provider contract item.

 

Overview of the End-to-End Process

Integration between Subscription Billing and S4HANA Cloud

For interactive overview, please visit SAP Help page.

Revenue Recognition Methods for Provider Contracts

Revenue Recognition Key

Revenue Recognition Methods for Provider Contracts

PPC

Provider Contracts 360 Days Calendar Year - No costs deferred

Time-based revenue recognition which is based on billing plan with a 360 days calendar year. No costs are deferred.

PPCA

Provider Contracts 365 Days Calendar Year - No costs deferred

Time-based revenue recognition which is based on billing plan with a 365 days calendar year. No costs are deferred.

PPCN

Periodic Provider Contracts - No revenue recognition

Recognise revenue as accrued

 

In this blog, we will focus on the Revenue Recognition PPCA (365 days) key with also the freeze period in between.

So, we have subscription billing for 1 year. However, there is a freeze period for 6 months after contract started for 3 months. During the freeze period (April - September), there should not be any revenue recognition.

Let's review the subscription billing, 

Contract start date: 01.01.2024

Contract end date: 31.12.2024 

In the line item 2, we have recurring charge type (02) and we maintained Rev Rec Key PPCA.

However, we also have a freeze period between April - September. The contract resume on 1st October, 2024.

This is the result of Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Provider Contracts.

We can use Product and Margin Fiori App to see the Revenue, Cost and Margin in Provider Contract. And as expected, we do not have any revenue from period 3 to period 9.

Quick look on the SSCUI 105138 - Derivation of Recognition Key for Provider Contracts, we can define the Rev Rec Key based on Company code, Charge Type and Product dimension.

I can recommend to read this blog Subscription Billing with Convergent Invoicing and Contract-Based Revenue Recognition from @volkmar_zahn

entry.title: Re: Auto Warehouse task creation after Goods receipt is done in putaway
entry.content: As the WOCR logic , you will have to check the activity PTWY within SPRO ->SCM EWM-EWM-Crosss process setting ->Warehouse order -> "Define Search Sequence of Creation Rules for Activity Areas"

entry.title: USE OF AI IN ECLIPSE
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to use AI in eclipse. My requirement is like this,

I want to auto generate CDS, Database tables , domain , data elements, directly in my package using the Prompt, now we have AI options like 

1)  Joule 

But Joule serves primarily as an assistant to enhance productivity. It offers AI-based capabilities that help in understanding complex development objects, generating code snippets, and providing interactive support through a chat interface.

for joule i have used this blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-speaks-abap/ba-p/14018226

2) i have read this post also, which may be the possible way to achieve this functionality

I have gone through this post but its in beta and beta features are enabled in my cockpit, and still i am not able to see that option in my eclipse.  

teched2024-AD180/exercises/ex01/README.md at main · SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180 · GitHub

Can any one suggest me a solution, it will be helpful 

Thanks,

Basant

entry.title: Re: Hide fields for Onboardee but not for recruiter
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try to hide this via RBP. In RBP, for each object's fields, there is an option called 'Field Level Override.' Under Field Level Override, you can specify which fields should be visible and which should be hidden.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Build and Launch a Simple Spring Boot App(web-service) on SAP BTP
entry.content: @manojkumargct in your manifest.yml the buildpacks configuration is commented! hence CF runtime when preparing to deploy cant figure out what to deploy!

entry.title: i need to block the upload and creation of sap FSM if the related BP in SAP Business One is inactive

entry.title: SAP Jobs & Internships in Armenia
entry.content:
Looking for your next big move? Or got an open role to share?
This is the space to post and discover job opportunities, internships, and freelance gigs within our community. Let’s help each other grow 🚀

entry.title: CVE-2024-4741 (OpenSSL) vulnerability in Crystal Reports Runtime for VS
entry.content:
Could you please confirm plans to address CVE-2024-4741 (OpenSSL) in Crystal Reports Runtime for VS?

SP37 contains libssl-3-x64.dll version 3.2.0.0. It needs to be 3.2.2 or later to address this vulnerability.

entry.title: Re: Joule Setup / Error during Booster Execution
entry.content: Hi George, we had instances on the respective subaccounts. We also thought that this may be the cause of the error, so i changed it today and used one subaccount for joule and buildworkzone. Now the formation seems to have been created without errors. We still have some other errors but for now Joule is working.

Best regards

Ralf

entry.title: Re: SAP Jobs & Internships in Armenia
entry.content:
Ttwo-month internships at ACBA

ACBA Bank / RevyTech  is currently accepting  applications to internship@acba.am with the subject line "For SAP Business Consulting" and include your CV.

Applicants are advised to complete the Learning Journeys listed below. The more courses completed, the higher the chances of selection!

1.Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise

2.Exploring Cloud ERP 

1.Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: S/4 Hana Public Cloud - Workforce Management Perspective
entry.content:
To Begin , this article is for people who are planning to implement S/4HANA Public cloud along with Employee Central as the frontend for HR data.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is a ready-to-run enterprise resource planning (ERP) system that delivers the latest industry best practices and business application solutions on a public cloud network. It offers an efficient, agile, and affordable solution for connecting your workforce, suppliers, customers, markets, and assets without adding complexity. 

 

HR in S/4 HANA Public cloud

 

For HR processes, SAP recommends using SAP SuccessFactors solutions, which are seamlessly integrated with SAP S/4HANA Cloud. In S/4 HANA cloud employees are termed as workforce persons and process of managing their data is referred as workforce management.

 

HR information is processed and stored in HR system. However, basic employee information is required to execute various processes in S/4 system such as project planning, billing, project time recording etc. This information is made available through workforce integration

 

SAP SuccessFactors system can be integrated with S/4 system through Master Data Integration covered in scope ID JB1 Core HR with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (JB1) . This scope supports transfer of employee data (including contingent workers). It includes basic data, such as employee name and ID, and contact details, such as workplace address, e-mail, and telephone information.

 

Below are relevant scope ids where integrated HR data is used

J12- Time Recording - Project-Based Services (J12)

6JO- Resource Management for Projects (6JO)

Integration (MDI)

SAP Master Data Integration service is a central master data hub. Applications integrate with SAP Master Data Integration to synchronize their local master data databases with the master data database of the central hub.

Data flow and field mapping

SAP Master Data Integration enables you to share consistent master data across multiple products easily and efficiently. Once the relevant products, applications, or landscapes are connected to SAP Master Data Integration, master data is synchronized between them.

Following order for data flow is recommended for successful data replication between S/4 HANA Public cloud and SAP SuccessFactors.

Step

Entity

Source

Destination

1

Company Code

S/4 HANA Public Cloud

SAP SuccessFactors

2

Cost Center

S/4 HANA Public Cloud

SAP SuccessFactors

3

Bank Data

S/4 HANA Public Cloud

SAP SuccessFactors

4

Workforce person

SAP SuccessFactors

S/4 HANA Public Cloud

5

Availability information

SAP SuccessFactors

S/4 HANA Public Cloud

Replication of master data such as Company code, cost center and bank data to SuccessFactors determines base to process employee information and maintain data which will be uniform once it is replicated back to S/4 HANA Public cloud.

Field Mapping between S/4 HANA Public Cloud and SuccessFactors

SAP has provided pre-defined field mappings for most of the entities when Employee master data is replicated from SuccessFactors to S/4 HANA. SAP note 3078790 provides a list of mapping and configuration activities required in case of custom data handling.

Integration Process

 

We will cover end to end integration process from both S/4 and SF systems. The process of configuring integration should follow below sequence. These steps are described in detail.

 

 

S.No.

Step

In which system to perform the step

1.

Creating a service instance and a service key

SAP Business Technology Platform

2.

Configure a business system ID

SAP Business Technology Platform

3.

Configure write permissions

SAP Business Technology Platform

4.

Create user in SF for communication

SAP SuccessFactors

5.

Creating communication systems and communication arrangements

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

6.

Configuring Destinations

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

7.

Configure distribution models in Business Data Orchestration

SAP Business Technology Platform

8.

Configure OAuth connection

SAP SuccessFactors

9.

Configuration for Master Data Integration for all object types

SAP SuccessFactors

10.

Enable Address Mapping

SAP SuccessFactors

11.

Configure Business Scenario

SAP SuccessFactors

12.

Configure Availability Iflow

SAP Integration Suite

 

 

  1. Creating a service instance and a service key

For each application you connect, you will have to create a dedicated service instance of SAP Master Data Integration from the SAP BTP marketplace. After creating the service instance, you create a service binding to obtain the credentials to establish the technical connectivity to the application.

 

  • Navigate to Services > Service Marketplace and select Master Data Integration. Choose Create and enter information required.
  • Service - select Master Data Integration
  • Service plan- select sap-integration. This service plan must be chosen for connecting SAP-branded cloud applications (e.g., SAP S/4HANA Cloud).
  • Provide instance name
  • In the next screen configure service instance parameters. Provide a value for the mandatory application attribute based on the application that you intend to connect. We have maintained “sfsf” as provided by SAP for SAP SuccessFactors Application (ref. Connecting Applications via Service Instances | SAP Help Portal )

2.Configure a business system ID and write permissions

The businessSystemId acts as a display name for the client represented by the service instance in the Business Data Orchestration UI. Also, the businessSystemId configuration attribute is mandatory to connect a client using the SOAP API for Business Partner.

 

You should only configure businessSystemId if the documentation of the connected application demands it.

 

  • Navigate to the service instance.
  • Select ... -> View Parameters to view the current attribute configuration of the service instance.
  • Copy the JSON object with the current state of attributes.
  • Select ... -> Update. Paste the existing JSON object and add, update, or remove the relevant attributes. Note that the update operation does not patch the existing configuration, it replaces the full state of configuration. Therefore, it is important to provide all relevant attributes in the update operation.
  • Add the following attribute to configure the businessSystemId.

 

"businessSystemId": "<businessSystemId>"

 

  • The businessSystemId attribute should have a length of up to 60 characters and it must be unique within a tenant.
  • Add the following attribute to configure the writePermissions

 

"writePermissions": [

                                                            { "entityType": "<entityTypeOdmName1>" },

                                                            { "entityType": "<entityTypeOdmName2>" },

                                                            ...

                                                            ]

Example-

"writePermissions": [

                                             { "entityType": "sap.odm.finance.costobject.CostCenter" },

                                             ]

 

 

3.Creating communication systems

  • Navigate to Communication Systems app. Create New system
  • Define ID and name
  • Enter General and contact details
  • Host Name- Enter the host name of the remote system for outgoing API service calls. Please note that the usage of localhost is not allowed as host name.
  • Enter users for inbound and outbound communication.

 

 

4.Create communication arrangements

Create below communication arrangements to allow data replication of our required objects:

  • SAP_COM_0001 Employee Integration
  • SAP_COM_0644 Photo Replication
  • SAP_COM_0056 Employee Central Cost Center Integration
  • SAP_COM_0379 Bank - Bank Integration
  • SAP_COM_0441 Employee Central Financial Master Data Integration
  • SAP_COM_0914 Workforce Availability Integration
  • SAP_COM_0301External HR Workforce Integration                                        
  • SAP_COM_0594Business Data Orchestration Integration                             
  • SAP_COM_0659SAP Master Data Integration                                                   
  • SAP_COM_0943Business Object Cost Center Integration

5.Configuring Destinations

These steps are required to set up a destination for the connection to Business Data Orchestration

  • Go to your SAP BTP Cockpit under Subaccount  Connectivity  Destinations.
  • Provide below details to create new destination:
  • Name
  • Type- HTTP
  • URL- Provide the service URL from the MDO Distribution Administration OData V4 service. Look for MDO: Distribution Administration among the inbound services with application protocol OData V4 that was generated while creating the communication arrangement SAP_COM_0594, and copy the entire URL into this field.
  • Create different distribution model for each object type to be replicated with URL specified for each object type.
  • User and Password: As defined for the user assigned to the communication system

 

Workforce data

URL- https://my<number>-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata4/sap/mdo_distributionadmin/srvd_a2x/sap/distributionadmin/0001/

 

Bank Data

URL- https://my<number>-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_bank/srvd_a2x/sap/bank/0003/Bank

 

Cost center

URL- https://my<number>-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_cost_center/srvd_a2x/sap/costcenter/0001/A_CostCenterText_2

 

 

 

 

6.Configure distribution models in Business Data Orchestration

Create separate distribution models for each object type with details as below:

  • Model    name- Customer specific name for each model
  • Business Object Type- Respective business object type for each object type
    • Workforce Person- sap.odm.workforce.WorkforcePerson
    • Bank Data- sap.odm.finance.bank.Bank
    • Cost center- sap.odm.finance.costobject.CostCenter
  • Mode- Mode of data flow
    • Workforce Person- Pull
    • Bank Data- Push
    • Cost Center- Create 2 distribution models one with Push mode and one with Pull mode
  • Provider interface- choose respective API with latest version
    • Workforce Person- MDI_LOG_WORKFORCE_PERSON
    • Bank Data- MDI_LOG_BANK
    • Cost Center- MDI_LOG_COST_CENTER(Pull)/ MDI_CHANGE_COST_CENTER(Push)
  • Consumer- Choose a consumer destination for the distribution model created in previous section.

 

 

 

7.Configure OAuth connection

  •           Go to Admin Center > Security Center > OAuth Configurations
  •              Add new configuration
  •              Grant Type: Client_Credentials
  •              Client ID: Value from clientid in the service key credentials
  •              Client Secret: Value from clientsecret in the service key credentials
  •              Token URL: Value from url in the service key credentials + /oauth/token

 

8.Configuration for Master Data Integration for all object types

  • Go to Manage Data> Create new > SAP Master Data Integration Configuration
  • Select Integration object as Bank
  • Select Parameter as “Is Migration object”
  • Provide response value as No. Save the configuration.
  • Repeat new configuration for integration object as Workforce Person.
  • Select and add parameter for photo replication if photo replication is required.
  • Provide cutoff dates by selecting relevant parameters.

 

9.Enable Address Mapping

  • Go to SAP SuccessFactors Upgrade Center and search for Best Practices Address Mapping for SAP Master Data Integration.
  • Select the option and choose Upgrade Now. Address mapping is configured automatically.

 

 

10.Configure Business Scenarios

  • You would need to run/schedule certain business scenarios from EC in order to trigger master data replication. These can be found under Admin Center> Business Scenarios
  • Bank/ Cost Center Replication from SAP Master Data Integration to EC – You need to provide Oauth config , API URL in source settings
  • Provide operation URI specific for object type-
  • Bank- /v0/odm/3.0.0/log/sap.odm.finance.bank.Bank
  • Cost center- /v0/odm/3.1.0/log/sap.odm.finance.costobject.CostCenter

 

  • For Workforce Replication- Provide details in destination settings. Set HTTP Method as POST
  •  

  •  

  •  

 

 

 

 

11.Configure Availability Iflow

 

  •    Select integration package and artifact

Select integration package as “SAP SuccessFactors - Employee Availability Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud” and artifact as “SFSF_EC_to_S4HANA_Availability”

  •    Configuration

Go to Security material under Manage security section and maintain the user and passwords for S/4 HANA and SuccessFactors systems.

 

In the artifact below screen appears. Click on configuration and set configuration values for the integration.

 

  • Set schedule of replication as required

 

 

 

Business Partner and Vendor creation

 

A work assignment defines the relationship between a worker and a specific company or legal entity, also known as a work agreement. Each work assignment is uniquely identified by a Work Assignment ID.

 

A workforce person can have multiple work assignments, either at different times or simultaneously. When there are multiple assignments, the system automatically determines the main employment, which indicates the current active employment.

 

Each workforce person and their work assignments are represented by various business partners, each with a specific role.

 

Points to note-

  • To represent an internal workforce person or employee, one BP with the Employee role is created.
  • For each work assignment for an employee, a separate BP with the Employment role is created.
  • Bank data is stored on the employment BP. If bank data is maintained in employment BP, the Supplier (FLVN00) role is added to employment BP automatically.

 

Conclusion :- This Article gives you Indepth insight of the workfoce managment and integration between successfactors to S4/Hana Public cloud. 

In the next Blog , the aspects of integration with Resource management will be covered including talent intelligence hub and availability control from EC to Resource management.

Thanks to Divya Gopal , Amruta Chitale , Arghya Sengupta , Mahesh Joshi  , Nitin Patil , Sourabh Panigrahi , Mayank Barui from My current Organization to help and contribute to this Blog.

entry.title: Re: BDLS Conversion required in other productive systems...
entry.content: Hi Martin, My question is not on the ECC system, but on the other integrated systems.

entry.title: Re: Custom Message Mapping - TPM - B2B - SAP Integration Suite

hello everyone,

entry.title: Re: Adding Quote Items to Existing Sales Order in ECC
entry.content:
@VasanthaSAPCPQ 

As you mentioned SAP ECC, its purely you will have to analyze the need from customer and to be developed as custom solutions. There is no standard solutions for your question. you can use the APIs to consolidate and have it into Sales Order..

entry.title: Re: SAC Story date Issue
entry.content:
@yoursraghu986 

So If I understand this correctly, With Date IP control you have managed to show the column is red but you also want to show the yellow column which is January month Opening Balance. You can try the below with some scripting.

  • Create a restricted measure calculation for the column in yellow. Use Input Control for restricting Date.
  • Now you can use script to read the current Input control selection which will return 2024.10, Use script to manipulate this to create 2024.01 ( 01 is fixed, you just need to get year from date ip control selection). Store this in variable. Alternatively you can also read this from table if date member is available in axis or filter.
  • Use this value to set the input control of restricted measure.

Useful API's

InputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers()

InputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembers()

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: The Next Decade of Enterprise Technology: Are We Ready?
entry.content:
The world of enterprise technology is on the brink of an unprecedented transformation. From AI-driven automation to low-code development and cloud-based ecosystems, the landscape is shifting rapidly. Organizations that fail to adapt risk falling behind, while those that embrace innovation will gain a competitive edge. I want to talk about the three major trends that are fueling that transformation.

 

The Three Major Trends Shaping Enterprise Technology



1. AI & Automation as a Core Business Strategy

Artificial intelligence (AI) is no longer a futuristic concept—it is the backbone of modern enterprises. Organizations that successfully integrate AI into their business models will not only streamline operations but also unlock new revenue streams. AI-powered tools like SAP Joule bring generative AI into enterprise workflows, enabling predictive analytics, automation, and intelligent decision-making at scale.

Automation is also shifting from simple robotic process automation (RPA) to intelligent process automation (IPA). Unlike traditional automation, IPA incorporates machine learning, cognitive intelligence, and data analytics, allowing businesses to automate more complex tasks. This shift means companies need to think beyond cost reduction and focus on value creation through automation.

2. The Consumerization of Enterprise Software

The workforce of today expects the same seamless, user-friendly experience from enterprise software as they do from consumer apps. The traditional complexity of enterprise software is becoming a barrier to efficiency, and organizations are increasingly investing in modern, intuitive solutions.

SAP Fiori is a prime example of how enterprise software is evolving. By providing a streamlined, easy-to-navigate UI, SAP Fiori enhances productivity and user adoption. Similarly, low-code and no-code platforms like SAP Build empower employees across departments to create applications and automate processes without extensive programming knowledge. This democratization of development is accelerating innovation across industries. Additionally, adding WalkMe’s smart usability capabilities and expanding AI functionalities adds a layer of significant user-experience enhancement.

3. From ERP to Connected Ecosystems

For decades, enterprises relied on monolithic ERP systems to manage their core processes. However, the future lies in composable architectures and interconnected ecosystems to allow for fast adaptation to changes and reduced time to shipping new products and processes. In order to secure that speed and flexibility, organizations will move towards products like the revolutionary SAP Business Data Cloud, which allows them to unify and analyze data from multiple sources in real time, breaking down traditional data silos and providing access to cross-silo data for training of Large Language Models and the use of agentic AI platforms like Joule.

By leveraging cloud platforms, APIs, and microservices, businesses can now create more flexible, scalable IT infrastructures that support innovation and adaptability.

Preparing for the Next Decade

To stay ahead of the curve, enterprises must adopt a proactive technology strategy. This involves:


✅ Investing in AI and automation to enhance productivity and decision-making.
✅ Focusing on user experience to improve software adoption and efficiency.
✅ Embracing connected ecosystems for real-time data analysis and insights.
✅ Prioritizing security and compliance to protect sensitive business data in an increasingly digital world.

The question is no longer whether businesses should adopt these technologies, but how quickly they can implement them to remain competitive.

What do you think is the most important enterprise tech trend shaping the next decade?

entry.title: Re: SAP Opens Restaurant
entry.content: Went there. Mi initial beer was empty. As expected.

entry.title: Re: Restrict the "Release" and "Pay" button in the App "Make Bank transfers
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Data Access Control in Data Builder and Authorization Scenario in Business Builder - SAP Datasphere.
entry.content:
Hello All,

Welcome back again. Before exploring this blog post, kindly visit the below link, where I created a scenario and demo on DAC based on hierarchy 

Link :  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/data-access-control-in-data-builder-

and-authorization-scenario-in-business/ba-p/14063171 


Now let us explore DAC along with the new authorization scenario that is available in Business Builder. This blogpost is going to be a unique post where I have illustrated a business case exploring both DAC in the Data Builder and the New Authorization Scenario in Business Builder for the business folks.

Now let us deep dive and understand the scenario. Here in this blog post I am not going to discuss the theory part, as there are enough sources available on the internet. We will understand the DAC and new authorization scenario both with an example. Now get set and go!

1st Step :

Create a product dimension table.

Business Name: Products_Dim

Technical Name: Products_Dim
Below are the table attributes and records.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
So our dimension table is ready.
 
 
Step 2 : Create the control table or permission table or Authorization table.
 
below are the bsuiness name and technical name given to the permission table.
 
Business Name : Authorization_Example.
Technical Name: Authorization_Example

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Here in this permission table we have maintained 2 users. user sapbtp00 has access to both the product IDs and user sapbtp03 has access to only 1 product ID. Now in next steps let us create a DAC and apply that DAC to a view on products_dim table.

Step 3: Now create a DAC, i.e., Data access control

 Now we have created Data access control and apply this DAC to the view.

Step 4: Apply the DAC created to the view.

 

Now view the data in this model.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
As user sapbtp00 is viewing the data in the model, he has access to see only 2 products in the permission table that is why he is seeing 2 records, but when sapbtp03 person will run the view then he can only see the product RO-1001 only. you can test the same.
 
Now our DAC is ready in the Data Builder area. Now let us move to Business Builder area to create the new authorization scenario.
 
Business Builder in SAP Datasphere.
 
To give a short introduction, SAP clearly wanted to bifurcate between data engineers, as mainly their scope is in data builder, and for business people SAP created a business builder app where the business people can create their entity as per their need and play with the model. This reduces the gap between data engineers and business people and helps to maintain a balance and sync between both parties. with this business folks can create their model be it ER models or analytical models, in the business builder app and also create authorization scenarios. They can also create ADHOC storytelling dashboards as per their need. 
 
Now let us go to Business Builder and create new authorization scenario based on the DAC we created in data builder and product dimension table.
 
Now again get set go!
 

 

 
Before creating new authorization scenarios now, let us create dimensions and make sure business builder can consume those.
 
So let us create a dimension in business builder.
 
Step 1: Create a dimension.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

the dataset in the dimension in business builder.

 

so the dimension is ready in Business Builder.

Step 2:

Now, let us create a new authorization scenario.

 so we created a new authorization scenario based on the DAC we created in Data Builder.

Step 3: Apply the new authorization scenario to the products Dim table.

Now we created a new authorization scenario and applied the new auth scenario to the products dim table in the business builder app. Now we can view the data in the dim table.

 

Step 4 : Save this dimension as a consumption model.

 

so we created a consumption model as well. Perfect. But in a real project, it is ideal to create a consumption model based on a fact, as FACT is a multidimensional model with multiple associations.

Now let us see if this consumption model is visible to SAC or not. we will need to create a new perspective for the same. Now let us go to SAC.

in SAC we can see the perspective of the consumption model.

 

We can consume this model and create a story in SAC and enjoy it.

the above example illustrates the link between data builder and business builder with DAC in data builder and New Authorization scenario in business builder.

Thank you in advance.

Narasingha.

entry.title: Zero Delivery OBD still showing in Open for Billing
entry.content:
Hello Team ,

Nee your help on the issue. We have made a delivery zero in EWM and same is replicated to S/4 also with Zero Qty.

The GM status is marked as completed. However , Billing status is still open. Can you please suggest on why we are having this issue.

 

Regards

 

Sanjay Arora

entry.title: Re: Early billing in Phased Contract in BRIM
entry.content: Thank you for your reply @deepak_dash. Start of Billing date is only used for early billing date right? Or is there a separate Date profile for early billing, if so can you tell? and what other fields are mandatory

entry.title: Billing document -PDF Extract
entry.content: We would like to explore if there is a way to mass download invoices PDF format potentially thousand at a time. Currently we do not have an API available for this process. Could you please suggest a suitable approach.

entry.title: Record Warehouse defect serial managed material
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

As described on this SAP Help site to perform a posting in EWM with a quality notification it is required to create and link a warehouse defect in advance to provide to stock-specific information for the quality notification.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/15a64024397f4e219c2c800576023304.html?locale=en-US

Unfortunately the standard fiori app doesn't support serialized products. Already discussed with a SAP product/topic expert:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/fiori-apps-quot-record-warehouse-defect-quot-does-not-support-product-with/qaq-p/12685370

This topic is also not mentioned in the SAP Roadmap.

Is there any way to return a serialized material in private cloud to a supplier with a quality notfication process?

Kind regards

Michael

entry.title: Object Definition not coming in Manage Data
entry.content: I have created a custom Object definition but it is not available in manage Data.

entry.title: Re: Dashboard Usage Reporting
entry.content:
Hi Adam,

If you already have enabled Story Reports then you can import a template from the content store that shows report execution of table reports and Tiles & Dashboards: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PEOPLE_ANALYTICS/1a17ad0982664c629f8af7d47a631672/15c797546af74165b7489ad35e844c5d.html?locale=en-US

In case you have not yet enabled Story Reports then please read this IDP document for creating such a report in Table or Canvas reports: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/QN2myUU/SAP%20SuccessFactors%20People%20Analytics%20Story%20ReportV1.8-Dec2024.pdf?rc=67&inline=true

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Upcoming Removal of SAP Fiori Themes Belize and Blue Crystal
entry.content: Hi Marian, a few seconds faster, indeed 😀 - Fun fact: we actually published "jointly", since we cross-reference each other, but agreed to start at the bottom of the stack so to speak, i.e. first technology then applications.

entry.title: Re: SAC Story date Issue
entry.content: @N1kh1l Can you please elaborate in detail script implement

entry.title: Add f4 help to field CUST1 in ROIITANKDIP structure in SAP
entry.content: Need to add f4 help using standard search help for field CUST1 of structure ROIITANKDIP in sap

entry.title: Request for SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance Fiori Demo Videos & Resources
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I need to demonstrate key SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance processes using the Fiori Demo environment, and we already have access to the SAP Demo system. Could anyone help by sharing reference videos, online resources, or YouTube links that include data models and step-by-step demonstrations? Any insights, links, or references to hands-on demonstrations would be highly appreciated! Specifically, we are looking for Fiori demo videos covering the following topics:

L4 Business Process Topics (BPD Topics):

  • Phase In / Phase Out of Equipment
  • Non-Routine Maintenance (Reactive, Minor, Emergency Maintenance)
  • Routine/Preventive Maintenance
  • Refurbishment (In-House / External)
  • Condition-Based Maintenance
  • Maintenance Planning
  • Resource Scheduling Management
  • Shutdown Maintenance
  • Routine Maintenance (Work Clearance Management)                                                                            

    Thanks in advance.

entry.title: IFRS 15 - Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hi, 

We'r in a public cloud implementation and the customer is reporting related to IFRS 15, I found in Cloud ALM that there is a requirment to raise a ticket if this is needed. In Cloud ALM and when reading about this there is one reference to a note 2524569 in several places however this not is not available and haven't been for a while. Where can I find this information instead? Any tips? 

Kind Regards, Sanne
